entry.data:
CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
